retrieved_result: select.surnames4.website \"Select Barrett Surname Genealogy Barrett origins are unclear. One line of thinking is that the word was derived from the Old French barat and barater meaning “commerce” or “dealings” and described a market trader; or possibly it could have been a nickname for someone quarrelsome.
